title: CobblemonTycoon 2
description: Version 1.21.1 | Explore and battle in Minecraft with the Create and Cobblemon mods, blending engineering and Pokémon-style adventure!
body:
Modpack Features

- Dive into a richly enhanced Minecraft experience focused on the innovative ~~Create~~ (pending update) and exciting Cobblemon mods, supplemented with handy features like advanced storage solutions, portable backpacks, waystones for travel, and more for a comprehensive and engaging adventure. - Transform your Minecraft world with Terralith, YUNG's mods, and Towns and Towers for more complex and engaging environments. - Revitalize your Minecraft world with environmental enhancements: dynamic seasons, realistic foliage, and immersive audio effects, all tailored for a richer, more engaging natural experience - Enhance your Minecraft visuals and performance with this suite of rendering mods, featuring Sodium, ~~Starlight~~, Iris Shaders, and more for stunning graphics and seamless gameplay. - Boost your Minecraft's stability and performance with a comprehensive pack of fixes, from crash prevention and FPS enhancements to smoother entity management and interface improvements. - Enhance gameplay convenience with our QoL features, including intuitive inventory management, dynamic animations, detailed maps, and user-friendly interface tweaks, all to improve your Minecraft experience.
Modpack Contents
**Resource Packs:** - [Motschen's Better Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-leaves) (enabled by default) - Resource pack to make leaves look bushier. - [Xaero's Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xaeroscobblemon) (enabled by default) - Adds Cobblemon icons to the minimap. **Shaders:** - [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) (disabled by default) - Recommended shader pack. CobblemonTycoon 3 is the ultimate fusion of Pokémon adventure and industrial automation. Explore a breathtaking, overhauled world, catch and train Cobblemon, and build sprawling Create-powered factories to fuel your Pokémon empire. Whether you're engineering a contraption to mass-produce Poké Balls or trekking through stunning new biomes to find that rare spawn, CobblemonTycoon 3 has something for every playstyle. --- ## Cobblemon Build your team, explore the world, and become the greatest Trainer — now with: - **Cobblemon** — The fan-favourite Pokémon mod for Minecraft - **Cobblemon Size Variation** — No two Pokémon are exactly alike - **Cobblemon Industries** — Automate your Cobblemon gameplay with machines and factories - **Cobblemon Integrations** — Deep compatibility with the rest of your modpack - **Spawn Notifications** — Never miss a rare Cobblemon spawn again --- ## Create: Build Your Empire Automate everything with the full Create ecosystem: - **Create** + **Create Encased** — The core of your automation empire - **Create: Addition**, **Stuff & Additions**, **Things & Misc** — Dozens of new machines and components - **Create: Central Kitchen** + **Confectionery** + **Enchantment Industry** — Process food and enchantments at scale - **Create: Generators**, **Jetpack**, **Dragons Plus** — Power up and take flight - **Bells & Whistles**, **Mechanicals**, **Extra Gauges**, **Copycats+**, **Create Deco**, **Create Framed** — Build beautiful, detailed factories - **KubeJS** — Script and customize your modpack experience --- ## World Generation A world worth exploring: - **Terralith** + **Tectonic** — Stunning terrain overhaul with hundreds of new biomes - **YUNG's Complete Suite** — Better Caves, Dungeons, Strongholds, Mineshafts, Desert Temples, Jungle Temples, Nether Fortresses, Ocean Monuments, Witch Huts, End Island, Bridges & Extras - **YUNG's Cave Biomes** — Beautiful underground environments to discover - **Dungeons & Taverns** + **Dungeons & Desires** — Discover dangerous structures across the overworld --- ## Lifestyle & Farming Live off the land: - **Farmer's Delight** + **Slice & Dice** — Expand your culinary horizons - **Let's Do: Vinery, Bakery, Brewery, Candlelight, Farm & Charm, Herbal Brews, Meadow, Alpine Whispers, Blooming Nature, Wilder Nature** — A full artisan lifestyle experience - **Cold Sweat** + **Create: Cold Sweat Integration** — Temperature matters; dress and prepare accordingly - **Thirst Was Taken** + **Thirst Canteen** — Stay hydrated on your adventures --- ## Building & Decoration Make your base a masterpiece: - **Macaw's Doors, Roofs, Windows, Furniture, Lights, Fences, Paintings, Holidays** — Hundreds of new building blocks and decorations - **Supplementaries**, **Amendments**, **Interiors** — Detailed furnishings for every room - **Building Wands** — Place blocks faster and smarter - **Snow Real Magic** + **Snow Under Trees** — Realistic winter ambiance --- ## Quality of Life Play smarter, not harder: - **JEI** + **Just Enough Resources** — Know every recipe and resource - **Jade** — Inspect anything you're looking at - **Xaero's Minimap & World Map** — Never get lost - **Traveler's Backpack** — Carry everything you need - **Inventory Profiles Next** — Sort and manage your inventory with ease - **Gravestone** — Keep your items safe on death - **AppleSkin** + **Shulker Box Tooltip** + **Advancement Plaques** — Polished HUD improvements - **Not Enough Animations** — Smoother, more expressive player animations - **Nature's Compass** — Find any biome instantly - **Tree Harvester** — Chop entire trees in one swing - **e4mc** — Easy multiplayer with friends, no server required --- ## Performance Buttery smooth, even with hundreds of mods: - **Sodium**, **Lithium**, **FerriteCore**, **ModernFix**, **EntityCulling**, **Dynamic FPS**, **FPS Reducer** - **Iris Shaders** — Full shader support for a stunning visual experience - **Entity Model & Texture Features** — Enhanced mob visuals without the lag --- **Minecraft 1.21.1 | NeoForge**
